conditional_states.condition: Results stream or paginate as the query is refined.
Server-side search may be slow and needs an in-field progress cue.
Debounced results may briefly reflect a previous query.
Search depends on a remote index unavailable without connectivity.
Combobox/typeahead with an open results popup and a highlighted option.
Suggestion list and clear control sized for coarse-pointer use.
Result list appearance must not depend on animation.

rationale: Search must distinguish four outcomes that are easy to conflate: typing/loading, a successful result set, a valid query with zero matches (empty / no-results, with guidance), and an actual error. The empty no-results state is required and must differ from the initial idle state. As a combobox it needs keyboard arrow/enter/escape handling and a focus state.
evidence: WAI-ARIA combobox pattern: keyboard navigation of the suggestion popup and active-descendant highlighting.
WCAG 2.2 4.1.3 (Status Messages): announce result counts and 'no results' to assistive tech.
NN/g search guidance: a no-results page must explain why and offer next steps, distinct from an error.
